headline: AM Best Comments on Credit Ratings of The Wawanesa Mutual Insurance Company Following Announced Acquisition of Everest Insurance Company of Canada
summary: OLDWICK, N.J., March 24, 2026--AM Best has commented that the Credit Ratings (ratings) of The Wawanesa Mutual Insurance Company (Wawanesa Mutual) (Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada) remain unchanged following its announcement to acquire Everest Insurance Company of Canada (Everest Canada) (Toronto, Ontario, Canada), the Canadian retail insurance operations of Everest Group, Ltd. (Everest Group) (Bermuda) [NYSE: EG].

raw.headline: AM Best Comments on Credit Ratings of The Wawanesa Mutual Insurance Company Following Announced Acquisition of Everest Insurance Company of Canada

headline: Everest Group to Hold First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call on Thursday, April 30, 2026
summary: HAMILTON, Bermuda, March 24, 2026--Everest Group, Ltd. ("Everest") (NYSE: EG) will hold its first quarter 2026 earnings conference call on Thursday, April 30, 2026, beginning at 8:00 am Eastern Time.

raw.headline: Everest Group to Hold First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call on Thursday, April 30, 2026
raw.summary: HAMILTON, Bermuda, March 24, 2026--Everest Group, Ltd. ("Everest") (NYSE: EG) will hold its first quarter 2026 earnings conference call on Thursday, April 30, 2026, beginning at 8:00 am Eastern Time.

headline: Everest to sell Canadian retail insurance unit to Wawanesa
summary: The proposed disposal is part of Everest’s stated shift away from its commercial retail insurance activities.
